name: AvbGetCrfAudioSampleClockFrequency
title: AvbGetCrfAudioSampleClockFrequency
description: The function retrieves the audio sample clock frequency of the CRF stream received by the Listener or originated by the Talker.
The nominal frequency of the audio sample clock is the frequency returned by this function multiplied by the clock multiplier (see AvbGetCrfAudioSampleClockMultiplier).

parameters.name: listenerOrTalkerHandle
parameters.description: The handle of the Listener or Talker.
